data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Credit-limit checks' as part of the saga. However, the evidence does not include any checks or validations related to credit limits, indicating a clear gap in the requirement fulfillment. The linked use case explicitly mentions the need for credit-limit checks, but no evidence was provided to confirm that this requirement was addressed in the saga lifecycle.
gaps: No evidence of credit-limit checks being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
